title: Prologue: As of Spring, This Guy Is…
overview: Kurogo starts his goal of trying to start his kabuki club, but not everything runs as smoothly as he had hoped.

title: Wisteria Grows in the Expression of My Love
overview: Kurogo attempts to get a couple of new members to join him in his hopeful kabuki club. Is he able to convince anyone?

title: You Say You Do Not Know? Then Let Me Tell You!
overview: The hopeful kabuki club is looking for a costume designer. Will they find the right person and finally be able to start the group?

title: Stop, Stop! I'm Here to Stop You!
overview: With the approval from the school, Kurogo finally has his kabuki group! Now they must prepare for their first show.

title: Hear Ye, Hear Ye!
overview: Akutsu saves the day with an incredible performance after Kurusu faints, but what does that mean for his place within the kabuki group?

title: Now, Upon Careful Consideration...
overview: Kurusu comes up with the idea for everyone to have a stage name. Meanwhile, Akutsu is surprised by an intimidating visitor.

title: Stop a Moment, Stop a Moment!
overview: Akutsu isolates himself in his room and ruminates over what happened in the past. Can the rest of the gang remind him of his importance?

title: The Moon Is Clouded Over...
overview: The kabuki group is busy preparing for their Kochi Fest performance. Meanwhile, Kurogo gets an unexpected visitor.

title: I Jumped In to Intervene...
overview: The kabuki group starts attempting to get more members. Meanwhile, Akutsu is struggling with his studies which could impact his involvement.

title: Family Is Eternal, but a Man Lives Only an Age
overview: The kabuki club celebrates finals being over! Akutsu gets some help in unraveling the secrets of his heritage from an unlikely source.

title: These Five Thieves Lined Up Here
overview: The kabuki club is presented with an interesting proposition by the boys' gymnastics team: a joint presentation for the new student welcome party! How does it go?

title: Although It Is Absurd That I Should Have to Say My Name...
overview: Kurusu, Tonbo, and Akutsu try one last time to convince Ebihara to join the kabuki club. Will they succeed?
